misconfig_patterns: root@sys with empty password in community edition default
MySQL wire at :2881 — connects with root and empty password
obshell REST API at :2886 exposes cluster status without auth
VECTOR type support added in OceanBase 4.3 — detectable via SHOW CREATE TABLE

active_probe.false_positive_check: obshell API at :2886 must return OceanBase-specific fields

deployment_tells: MySQL :2881 banner includes OceanBase version string
obshell :2886 REST API — GET /api/v1/status returns cluster state
pivot_paths: MySQL :2881 → mysql -h host -P 2881 -u root (empty password in community edition)
SHOW VECTOR INDEXES (4.3+) → detect AI workload
